message:
🌱 Add icon: raindrop with fish

SVG source + PNG exports for HA add-on store (256px icon, 128px logo).

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,34 @@
+<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 512 512" width="512" height="512">
+  <defs>
+    <linearGradient id="dropGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
+      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#42A5F5"/>
+      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#1565C0"/>
+    </linearGradient>
+    <linearGradient id="fishGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
+      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#FFB74D"/>
+      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#FF8A00"/>
+    </linearGradient>
+  </defs>
+  <!-- Water drop -->
+  <path d="M256 48 C256 48 128 220 128 320 C128 390.7 186.3 448 256 448 C325.7 448 384 390.7 384 320 C384 220 256 48 256 48Z"
+        fill="url(#dropGrad)" stroke="#0D47A1" stroke-width="8"/>
+  <!-- Water shine highlight -->
+  <ellipse cx="210" cy="280" rx="30" ry="50" fill="white" opacity="0.2" transform="rotate(-15 210 280)"/>
+  <!-- Fish body -->
+  <ellipse cx="260" cy="340" rx="65" ry="30" fill="url(#fishGrad)" transform="rotate(-8 260 340)"/>
+  <!-- Fish tail -->
+  <path d="M320 320 L355 295 L355 350 Z" fill="url(#fishGrad)" transform="rotate(-8 320 320)"/>
+  <!-- Fish eye -->
+  <circle cx="215" cy="332" r="7" fill="white"/>
+  <circle cx="213" cy="331" r="4" fill="#1A237E"/>
+  <!-- Fish mouth -->
+  <path d="M190 340 Q195 344 190 348" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="2.5" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
+  <!-- Fish fin (top) -->
+  <path d="M250 312 Q260 290 275 310" fill="#FF6D00" opacity="0.8"/>
+  <!-- Fish fin (bottom) -->
+  <path d="M255 358 Q260 372 270 360" fill="#FF6D00" opacity="0.7"/>
+  <!-- Small bubbles -->
+  <circle cx="200" cy="280" r="8" fill="white" opacity="0.35"/>
+  <circle cx="220" cy="260" r="5" fill="white" opacity="0.3"/>
+  <circle cx="190" cy="300" r="4" fill="white" opacity="0.25"/>
+</svg>
